arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-259788f055a04375879e48b387b9eb5d && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -30", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 `Category=Integration` tests passed. The command is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the `--filter` flag with xUnit's trait syntax (`Category=Integration`) to run only tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`.
